title: How To Make Plastic From Urine
description: Urea is the major constituent of urine - so you could o this with your own pee if you are feeling so inclined. Anyway, thanks to Jeremy for the help - it is similar to bakelite. Bakelite  is a thermosetting phenol formaldehyde resin, formed from a condensation reaction of phenol with formaldehyde. This uses urea and formaldehyde.
